service_event.summary: regularly scheduled maintenance including oil change tire rotation and various inspections

outcome.transcript:
[   2.0s] Customer: Hello.
[   7.0s] Kate: Hi, this is Kate calling about your two thousand twenty-five Jeep Grand Cherokee. Our system has detected that it needs service for maintenance. I'd love to help you get that scheduled at Village Jeep. Does that work for you?
[  22.0s] Customer: Yes.
[  31.0s] Kate: [slow] Give me just one second. I'm having a little trouble on my end fetching the available times. Let me try that again for you.
